title: VETERANS PROGRAM - 211info
text: FIDO PET FOOD BANK VETERANS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet food for dogs and cats. 14186 Fir Street Suite 203 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Veterans, active duty personnel, and families of service members Hours: Wednesday 9am-noon, by appointment only, 3rd Saturday of the month 9am-2pm If food is urgently needed outside of service hours, please call to coordinate sooner pick-up if available. Email (503) 655-3663 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-3663 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. First time recipients will need to complete an application online or onsite. FEES: Donation requested DOCUMENTS: Current military/dependent ID or a copy of DD214 with photo ID (e.g., drivers license) AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Past Clackamas County Public Services Building on Kaen Road. Turn left at parking lot F. Beside U-Haul. Services: Pet Food * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMEALS DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - FIDO PET FOOD BANK DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET NEEDS PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIDO PET FOOD BANK
